reference: My husband was just released from the hospital and was on blood thinners to help what was first diagnosed as a stroke, but the MRI showed it was not a stroke. He is forty-nine years old, in good health, and his blood work was good. He has developed a knot on the inside of his right knee about the size of a marble that appeared suddenly.
text: My husband was in the hospital with a dog's lung disease and hopeful for a first diagnosis of a stroke. But the MRI showed that was not a stroke. He is forty-nine years old, being good color, and his blood work is good. He has developed a nod on his head with a bite from a broken marble on a cured Sunday.
